title: Validity of Accreditation of Principal/Employer. Upon compliance with
content: 52 the documentary requirements, the principal/employer shall be accredited by the 53 Department for a period of not more than six (6) years, unless sooner revoked or 54 cancelled by the Department on any of the following grounds: 55 56 1. Expiration of the principal's/employer’s business license; 57 58 2. Upon pre-termination of the MA by the parties; 59 60 32 3. Submission of fraudulent documents which may constitute misrepresentation in 1 connection with the application for accreditation; 2 3 4. Final judgment for a disciplinary action resulting in permanent disqualification of 4 the principal/employer and delisting from the roster of accredited 5 principals/employers; and 6 7 5. Cancellation of license of the concerned LMA. 8 9 The expiration of the LMA’s license shall not cause the automatic expiration or 10 cancellation of the accreditation of its principal/employer. In case the license is not 11 renewed, either due to failure to apply or qualify for renewal, the accreditation of its 12 principal/employer shall be deemed cancelled. 13 14 The revocation or cancellation of the accreditation of a principal/employer shall not 15 absolve both the principal/employer and the LMA of their contractual obligations to all on- 16 board crew until the safe and expeditious return of said crew back at the point of hire and 17 settlement of all remaining wages/entitlements or until the transfer of the vessel to another 18 principal/employer and/or with another LMA. 19 20
